1: We used the device for my wife's severe cystitis. The applications were carried out twice a day for 30 minutes each in the bladder area. 2: Initial diagnosis: vestibular schwannoma. Completely deaf for 3 years. Repeated measurements by hearing acousticians - hearing capacity 0.0%! Description: The vestibular schwannoma (also known as acoustic neuroma) is a benign, slow-growing tumor located in the internal auditory canal, where the vestibulocochlear nerve sits in the brain. Above a certain size, the tumor can press against neighboring nerves, which can lead to hearing loss, tinnitus (ringing in the ears) and balance disorders. In extensive cases it can press on the brainstem and, rarely, even become life-threatening. Status 27.7.2016: After 12 applications, hearing capacity has been restored to the extent that phoning or a conversation (without a hearing aid!!!) is possible!

My treatment with the WasserVitalisierer was carried out by me over a period of 2 months, October and November 2015. 3-4 times a week I treated my lungs, front and back for 20 minutes each.

Use of the water vitalization device
Dear Sir or Madam,

I am now almost 72 years old and have professionally run a grain mill, a sawmill and a farm. From around the age of 60, breathing difficulties gradually set in, which often forced me to take a break from work. During walks, too, I often had to pause because I felt tightness in my chest and had the feeling of suffocating.
An examination by the lung specialist resulted in the diagnosis: bronchial asthma.
Since around 2012, the following medications for inhalation were necessary daily: Formatris and Novopulmon 200. My quality of life was of course considerably restricted and had of course also carried over to my psyche.
I used your device about 3 times a week for about 3 months. After 4 weeks the treatment showed an effect and I was able to discontinue the medications step by step. From the 4th month on, I carry out the treatment 2 times a week.
At the most recent lung function test in July of this year, the doctor could no longer detect any restriction of the respiratory function. I currently feel able again to carry out my forest and garden work without restriction, can take longer walks and enjoy my new quality of life - and hope that this will be lasting.
I would like to take this opportunity to thank you, who developed this device, and Mr. Gerhard ..., who procured this device for me.
Most sincerely yours, Karl P.

Already at the age of 35, complaints appeared in the joints, which then stopped again after a short time. With increasing age, these complaints then came back in ever shorter periods.
An analysis showed that it was rheumatoid arthritis, a chronic inflammatory disease of the joints. In the spring of this year, the disease appeared so extremely that movements were only possible with outside help and under severe pain.
The following clinical picture presented itself:
Inflammations in the metatarsophalangeal joints, ankle joints, knee joints, about four weeks later inflammations in the left hand, then in the right hand, in the right elbow joint and in the right shoulder joint, so that there was an almost complete inability to move. Treatment was carried out with pain-relieving ointments and, in the case of too severe pain, with painkillers. Otherwise, the joints were, as far as possible, no longer moved.
From the second week after the onset of this acute inflammation, the joints were treated 3-4 times a week with the WasserVitalisierer device. This treatment resulted in the swellings as well as the pain clearly receding on the day after each treatment. The device was used regularly 3-4 times a week for another four weeks. The swellings continued to recede clearly, so that the first walks in the fresh air were even possible without crutches.
After another 14 days of continuous use of the device, the mobility of the ankle joints, knee joints, shoulder and right hand was restored. All activities such as hobbies and driving are now possible again without restriction.

" That's how I recently read it in a renowned Baden-Württemberg horse magazine. Very one-sided and also only of limited effectiveness, I thought to myself. With our Domino none of the medications showed the desired effect – although we did without cortisone due to an existing EMS. Domino is a 12-year-old riding pony gelding that we bred ourselves. As a foal he caught a flu-like infection which probably laid the foundation for the cough that broke out in his 6th year of life. Despite conventional medical treatment the cough became chronic and continuously worse. Alternative healing methods such as acupuncture, bioresonance, inhalation, cough herbs etc. also did not show the desired effect. In spring 2017 Domino suffered more and more from the frequent, agonising coughing attacks. The pumping breathing cost him so much strength that he visibly lost weight. Long-rein work or playing in the riding arena were practically no longer possible. Only during rides with long canter sequences did the pony achieve some relief by coughing up the tough mucus. In June 2017 Nadine came to the stable for a Dorn treatment for our other pony. On that occasion she told me enthusiastically about the successes that could be achieved with high frequency. To my question whether chronic cough could also be alleviated with it, Nadine explained that she still lacked experience in this field but assumed it would be possible. Acting on gut feeling I immediately arranged six high-frequency appointments for Domino, each one to two days apart. Our impression was positive even if nothing concrete could be said yet. During the roughly one-hour treatment the pony mostly dozed relaxed. After a few weeks we noticed that the coughing attacks became rarer and rarer and finally stopped altogether. That's why I had Domino treated several more times with the high-frequency device at intervals of a few weeks. Since then he only coughs now and again. The pumping breathing has stopped despite the summer heat, so that I couldn't attribute it to favourable weather conditions or the like. The pony slowly put on weight again and visibly gained quality of life. In the meantime six months have passed since the first high-frequency treatment. For Domino and us it was a blessing, I would recommend it without hesitation. If I had to write an article about coughing horses, it would sound as follows: "Horses suffering from chronic cough can be treated not only with mucus dissolvers, bronchodilators, antibiotics and sometimes also cortisone. Alongside numerous alternative treatment methods, high-frequency therapy in particular leads, in our experience, to enormous improvement - free of side effects. It's worth a try! An often neglected factor is that the animals must have the possibility, through sufficient exercise, to cough up the mucus that has formed. As with humans with chronic respiratory diseases, endurance sport is a decisive cornerstone of the therapy. The combination of high-frequency treatment and physical exertion turned out to be ideal for our pony." Kind regards, Kerstin

179: Hello Mr. Tränkle, hello Mr. Duckgeischel, we have had the Wasservitalisierer for almost 3 years now and have already had many good experiences with it. The current results, however, surprised even me enormously. On Wednesday morning I left the house heading for the train station, because I had to take the train to an expert appraisal appointment. After a few hundred meters I really twisted my ankle very badly. Since I actively played volleyball for many years, I know these ankle injuries all too well. I've already had a cast on both feet because of it, and even milder cases usually take several weeks. The same thing happened to my wife about half a year ago and she was unable to work for 14 days, simply because she didn't treat it regularly. In any case, I immediately felt the severity of the ankle injury. For a short while I considered breaking off my trip, but then decided to simply keep going, since the appointment was enormously important. At first it was okay, but on the way back it got worse and worse and in the end nothing worked at all anymore, so that I had to take a taxi. At home I saw my swollen ankle and I did start the treatment, but the swelling and the severe pain led to a night with very little sleep. In the morning I could barely walk, so that I had to get out my old crutches. Since my wife has to go to work in the morning, she drove me straight to the doctor without any further treatment. The examining doctor could barely touch my ankle, it hurt so much, so she also ordered an X-ray because she wanted to rule out a fracture. There wasn't one, but a solid ankle sprain and traces of old injuries were diagnosed. She prescribed me painkillers (3x1 Diclofenac tablet) for the next few days so that I could sleep at night, and told me I should nevertheless move the foot at least a little so that the fluid in the swelling could drain. After that I was sent straight to physiotherapy to have the ankle taped. The treating therapist, who also works in competitive sports (among others in professional football), treated me briefly to decongest the ankle a bit and applied the tape. He also explained to me that I should move the foot if possible and that if the pain wasn't better by Monday, I should come again so that he can treat me accordingly. When I got home around noon, I started to treat the foot intensively with the device. Again in the evening, and then I could at least already take a good walk with my wife and dog, even if I was still limping a bit. Before going to bed one more treatment and I could sleep like a baby without taking even a single painkiller. This morning three treatments and this evening four, and I can walk as if almost nothing had happened. I was out with my dog for 8 km today and over 10 in total (I track my routes daily with the goal of walking at least 10,000 steps). Of course I still notice something in the ankle and can't put full weight on it yet, but I can walk completely pain-free, and this would be completely out of the question under normal medical circumstances, I know that from repeated experience! My family was completely speechless this evening, because they had seen that just a day earlier I couldn't walk at all without crutches. This is simply fantastic!!! I'm sending a few more pictures and short clips with it. Best regards, Ralf D.

185:
Hello, I'm Catherine, 63 years young.
My husband and I bought the Wasservitalisierer in July 2016. It was intended for my husband, who had fallen ill with metastatic prostate cancer, and although I had driven the matter forward and was quite enthusiastic, because I could observe the positive development in my husband up close, I only started to make use of its services a year later, i.e. in the summer of 2017.
It's crazy, because I had - from today's perspective - massive skin problems in at least 3 places and there was urgent need for action:
The upper layer of skin on my right thumb had been peeling off in scaly shreds since autumn 2016 and the finger was so open that I permanently had a disposable glove with me and used it.
On both shins I had a so-called infiltrative sclerodermiform basal cell carcinoma and with greater extent on the left shin.
And on top of that, in February 2017 I had noticed a basal cell carcinoma on the left lower eyelid.
Why did I come to it so late?
It was a longer process. Thanks to the workshops of the Plus Macher, which I diligently attended from the beginning, I slowly grew into my own body. When the Hand of Caligari was passed on to us, I was so enthusiastic that I immediately started to treat the points of the hand, the left hand mind you, and immediately enjoyed the perception of the individual organs inside me. I was now directly in contact with the pancreas, the spleen and the liver!
And then came the film "Wassermatrix" on 07/14/2017, in which some users talk about their results and Mr. Tränkle presents the knowledge about the Wasservitalisier and its effectiveness very synthetically.
It's as if I was struck by lightning, because I suddenly realized how badly my skin was diseased, and the very following week I called the dermatologist to get an appointment.
Unfortunately, or luckily, I had to be patient until mid-September!
The finger looked so bad that I decided to treat it immediately with the apparatus. I had nothing to lose. In my momentum I did the shins and the eyelid along with it.
Since the end of July 2017 I have been using the device virtually every day for one to one and a half hours, up to today.
The thumb was no longer sore within three days and even completely healed within 4 weeks.
The shins reacted very intensely to the treatment, which signaled to me that it works. On the eyelid there was no great reaction, however the nodule no longer grew. I was satisfied.
In September I cancelled my doctor's appointment.
Today, on April 28, 2018, I am not only still satisfied, but overjoyed. The finger is healthy, the tissue of the shins has almost completely regressed. I assume it still needs another 4 to 6 weeks to be flawless. The eyelid has only a small point left… and by the way, the lactose intolerance is gone! Greetings from the healthy pancreas!
I dedicate this experience report to my father, who would have had his 90th birthday today, because I know that from heaven he follows and accompanies our recovery.
And thanks to the Plusmacher!

Hello dear Arthur You often send me experience reports from other users many thanks for that.
Now I would also like to tell you what I noticed at the fitness centre. So the device the
Wasservitalisierer I've had for almost 2 years now. Back then I hadn't bought it because I now
had cancer or something similar, but purely as a precaution to get more energy so that something
like cancer can't even happen to me. I've been going to the fitness centre for over 4 years before that I

mobility or flexibility of my back was thus already sufficiently known to me and
even with however much practising I could never exceed this limitation so I couldn't stretch
that far and all the practising didn't really improve anything. So I always was a bit stiff in the
back. At 21 years old I already had the first lumbago in my back and since then again and again
pains in the lumbar spine area. Later on blockages in the thoracic spine area were also added these
trigger an urge to cough in me and the gradual calcification in joints and muscles were
for me long since clearly far too clearly to feel. Yes and now, in the last few days I notice that I
can stretch further in my back. Honestly I have never gotten down as far as now, I
come with my head almost to my feet – ok, not quite yet but that will still come. In the
lumbar spine area the pains are actually gone. Now and then I still feel it a bit in the early morning
when I get up but then it's gone right away too and is not at all comparable with what
once was earlier. I simply notice with my musculature I'm doing just really well right now. I've
made such a real leap forward. Honestly at 21 years old I wasn't as supple as
now and now I'm actually in my mid-50s. So this is what I call rejuvenation and honestly I attribute that
to the device. Ok, I do do other things too e.g. taking food
supplements. Maybe now it's not only the device but honestly I already took food supplements
quite a few years ago too and nothing really changed. But to muster up
the energy at all to always keep at it, to keep looking for something new to stay fit and
in doing so not to give up so to muster up this will, to want that. So this I attribute to the device
and in doing so I am totally grateful to you Arthur and Armin that you have brought this device into my life.
Many, many thanks.
231:
The patient Heidi K, came to my practice in August 2017 with total visual field loss in the left
eye due to an optic nerve inflammation.
By conventional medicine the inflammation could not be stopped and she feared also falling ill in the right
eye and going blind. After instruction she applied the Zellregenerator independently.
The antenna was placed at the vegetative nervous system in the neck, at the ears and mainly
at the cheekbones, the temples and at the forehead at the level of the eyebrows on both sides. The
patient quickly felt a relief in the left eye. At the same time the ability to see changed
in the right eye. Through the usual glasses she could no longer see sharply. Thereupon she switched
to an old pair of glasses with a lower dioptre and it went better.
After the 6 applications of 30 minutes each with the Zellregenerator she had a follow-up examination
at the ophthalmologist.
The result was astonishing. The optic nerve inflammation in the left eye had completely healed
and the dioptres from -2.5 in the right eye
had gone back to -0.25. This value however did not remain stable. In the right eye a cataract was
diagnosed and the patient is considering undergoing surgery.

October-November 2017, Corina H. Freiburg, lungs (severe cough and airway disorders)
I booked 8 treatments with my friend and alternative practitioner. Twice a week I then had the field applied
at her place according to the body rhythm as usual described starting with the ears... etc.
The pain point i.e. the lungs front left/right as well as back left/right each time a good 5-10 min

Spring 2018, On the back (encapsulated blackhead or gland!), it looked bumpy and ugly
and according to the dermatologist it could have been cut out, I always applied the field, 1-2 times a week,
this spot about 5 minutes after about 2-3 months it had disappeared.
April 2018, tennis elbow or computer-mouse arm (elbow pains on the right)
Body rhythm applied field as pain point the elbow 5-10 minutes also field-applied, after 3 times the
pain was gone.
April to August 18 and the therapy continues, white skin cancer
My mother has white skin cancer and always had to take such a cream from the dermatologist so that
the affected spots crust over and peel off. My mother comes regularly for 4 months
twice a week for field application and her skin has never looked better. She no longer takes the cream,
at the last visit to the dermatologist the dermatologist herself said that she looks good without her
knowing that she had had the field applied and the last dermatologist appointment was after all already 1 1/2 years back!!!
My mother is 82 years old.
The therapy continues as before, since it also does my mother good in her general condition.
My father applies the field in the same period after mum is finished also his cough and a
runny nose has disappeared. My father is 79.

After researching the symptoms on the internet it looked as if it had a cold. So I simply used the Wasserenergetisierer. Normally this guinea pig is very shy and it never wants to stay on your lap for long either, but during the application it stayed astonishingly calm. 273:
Testimonial for Arthur Tränkle
After very extensive experiences with the Wasservitalisierer I would finally like to write you a few lines.
About two years ago we bought "the device", as we call it, after a convincing talk in Stuttgart.
Back then we were already in a spirit of new beginnings, we were planning to emigrate to the Azores and were sure we'd certainly make good use of the device.
We were able to have very positive experiences while still in Germany, e.g. I hit my shin with a hatchet. A swelling was immediately visible, I treated myself right away with the device, about 1 hour. The swelling was gone, and no further complaints appeared either. Last year we then arrived here on the Azores and started our building project at the beginning of this year. That meant a lot of physical work, very much on the knees, heavy carrying, etc. Very soon I then had extreme problems with my knee, swollen to almost one and a half times the size, the swelling went down into the shin area and up into the thigh.
After intensive treatments, daily about 2 hours in the evening, the swelling had completely disappeared after about three days and mobility was practically completely restored. As soon as complaints occur again, I treat the knee for at least 1½ hours and the next day everything has subsided enough that trouble-free work is possible.
About 5 months ago I then had an accident, a container door, from which I wanted to cut out a piece of sheet metal, fell off the work trestles. I wanted to hold it, which of course was impossible, the door weighs about 150 kg. It fell along my shin onto the ankle. Luckily the door got caught somewhere, so that it didn't hit the ground completely, it would have severed my foot.
The edge tore open my shin up to the ankle joint over about 12cm, the bone and the tendons were visible.
I made myself a bandage and only in the evening did I open everything up again. It didn't look good, but going to the doctor was not an option for me. I immediately started the treatment with the device, got a few blisters from the treatment, because I didn't notice the heat due to the pain of the accident.
In the first few days it was very difficult in the mornings to "get going", the ankle joint was as if blocked, stepping on it was almost impossible. After about two weeks it got better, the pain subsided little by little and after a total of four weeks the wound was more or less closed.
Now, after about 5 months by now, all complaints and pains are gone, no more restrictions present.
Everyone who saw this injury urged me to go to the doctor, it would get infected because of the rusty container door, because of the severity of the injury, I would lose my foot, etc. I always trusted the device, and yes it worked. All the skeptics and critics are amazed.
I wouldn't want to be without the device, I wouldn't trade it for any price in the world.
We now live here on the Azores, offer a holiday apartment and whoever wants to can visit us, use the device and convince themselves of it. Or whoever doesn't want to do without the device on their holiday, we make ours available to you.
We've already had guests who tried it during a visit, they now want to have it too... Visit us on our website: https://eye-scream.wixsite.com/cristall
274: unbelievable!!! I'm surprised again and again. My mom has had problems with a nervous stomach for many years - nausea, diarrhea and often severe pain in the sternum. Despite the diagnosis of Sudeck's syndrome I haven't taken a single painkiller or any psychotropic drugs. In the meantime I don't care about the Sudeck's syndrome, it no longer has any power over me. That was a journey. I accepted the fear of the doctors, therapists and my fear as well as the shadow. Since then it no longer gets any energy and lo and behold, it no longer has any power over me and the foot is healing. The pain went down by 50% within the last few weeks. I only wear a tape anymore and no longer go to any doctor. The prognoses were: pain clinic, medication and psychotropic drugs, rehab. Duration up to 1 1/2 years etc. Now it's been seven months and I feel better and better. I'm so grateful and happy.

283: , Lumbago: Recently I was at a get-together with a friend. That morning she got lumbago. So I picked her up and brought my device along, with which she treated herself about 3 times spread over the afternoon, for a total of between 1 and 1.5 hours. As early as that evening Monika could bend down again to tie her shoes, which was completely impossible at midday. Afterward this pulling remained almost imperceptible for about 3 days – following that it slowly came back in waves, but no longer as strong, up to today - 4 weeks later. Toothache: At the age of 20 she got a bridge on her upper front teeth. For quite a few years a pulling pain could be felt on the front teeth, which she lived with. Furthermore, for several months a rather unpleasant "current flow" between an implant and 4 gold-crowned molars had been constantly present. By evening this current flow had ended and the pulling pain on the front teeth was completely gone. She surprised me just recently by reporting that she was still pain-free in the mouth area. Arthur: Dear Michi, I'm very curious about what you have to tell us.
We were at a university in Jasch. We had received a recommendation there to visit a professor who suffered from severe fits of weakness and paralysis symptoms in his left hand. Actually I went there with very low expectations. But he was very open. On the first day we treated him for 1 hour. What struck us the next day was that he already had a completely different body tension and he was much stronger and a feeling of warmth returned to his left hand. We then stayed on for 2 extra days, because the prices are, after all, not so easy for Romanian people to manage, and also to give him confidence. The feeling in his left hand was fully back on the third day and the feeling of weakness was gone too. He then told us that he also works with professional athletes and judokas, who then use the device for recovery.
We had a really crazy story in Wulscha in the south of Romania; there I had a patient who had a tumor behind the eye and the eye was already really slightly bulging out. He had a very strong feeling of pressure. When we treated this man, after 20 min. we could already see how the eye went back, that is, the tension went down. We treated him again over 3 days and consistently learned only positive things; in any case he lost his pressure. We must of course now get back in contact to see how things look medically, how the images look, but he felt very well and his eyesight was also much better because the pressure went away. He had seen little with that eye.
Then there were also the standard conditions that we treated at the fair.
Tensions etc. that disappeared.
But then we had a girl; I think she was mentally disabled, but even what we saw with her was already very moving. The girl was very quiet and seemed depressed. She always just sat there. When we then gave her the antenna, she literally opened up, she got color in her face and began to ask questions, and then it was clear to me that we can also influence people's psyche with our device.
Now there are still many trips ahead. We have also received an invitation to Bucharest, where a great many people are expecting us as well.
Arthur: You even treated a celebrity in Romania who is also very well known in Germany, Ion Tiriac, tennis player. We had the pleasure of breaking into circles I knew nothing about at all. Unfortunately, I only found out afterward who Ion Tiriac was. We are also invited to Constanța; there Gheorghe Hagi, a well-known football player, has his hotel and one of his training facilities. In the spring we will go there and do tests. I am sure that there too we will achieve great successes.
286:
I am Robert and today I am reporting on a premature baby. The baby came into the world 4 weeks early and ended up in the incubator for 1 week and was then handed over to the parents anyway. The child cried the whole time, probably because of cramps, slept poorly and little, used up a great deal of life energy, was too small with of course little weight. An overall discomfort was clearly visible. And of course the worries of the parents. The doctor said it would sort itself out at some point, but that's not how it turned out.
We started treating the child over a period of 4 weeks, and only 5 minutes each at the belly button per week. The vitalized water was given, 1 liter per week, through food intake. The changes in the child can be described relatively quickly; as early as the 2nd week the cramps were gone and the crying had clearly decreased, and after the 4 weeks it now cries quite normally because it is hungry, and sleeping through the night is now quite normal. The child's well-being is clearly recognizable from the weight gain, and it has grown. The parents now have a different face, much friendlier and more relieved. That means a clear development of the child has taken place. Now, a total of 4 weeks after the last treatment, the following statement came from the doctor, who continues to monitor the child. He had never before seen a child change so quickly and gain so strongly as a premature baby, because with premature babies it is not normal for them to make such a leap; the child has completely different reflexes, and indeed clearly better reflexes than comparable babies, the doctor said. For example, it holds on to a finger, which is apparently not so normal. Unfortunately you can't compare it; normally these babies would only have a grasping reflex and this child holds on. The most important sign of the changes is the head posture. The child can already hold its head by itself. That, I tell you, is insane, because I had this as a comparison; we had seen other babies there in the hospital. So overall an incredible development of the child. The parents themselves are very fascinated and cannot put it into words.

Hello Arthur, yesterday we recorded a success with Anna from Augsburg. She had, for quite a while, an almost chronic, extremely painful tension in her neck. A 41-year-old patient has suffered for about 4 years from, among other things, an incurable kidney insufficiency. Through various treatment methods they managed to keep the course of the illness from worsening, which was already a great success. 289:
Experience report from an osteopath, Mrs. Güler D. from Böblingen
Hello Arthur, today I would like to tell you about a male 60-year-old patient; he had an anaplastic astrocytoma grade 3 (brain tumor), which was operated on in 2006 and was further treated with radioiodine therapy. Then the finding was somewhat stable at first, but then it started up again. In 2013 it came back; in 2014 it had scattered. Then it was again treated with radioiodine, operated on again, and so the course went until he came to me. At the end of 2008 it was said that it continues to grow, that nothing more can be done.
When the patient came to me he had word-finding difficulties, he looked pale and had concentration problems. His partner reports that he is also aggressive, that is, impatient, simply not super fit in many areas. I then started on 23 October 2018 to treat him once a week with high frequency and also asked that they bring water, which was then treated with the field and lasted for a week. Since I had decided to treat him 1 time a week. After the 1st treatment I found that his complexion changed, that he became rosier in the face, that grayish paleness had changed. Then after the 2nd treatment we noticed that he is more alert. His partner also said that he can concentrate better. His fine motor skills also improved. After the 3rd / 4th treatment his partner found that word-finding came more easily to him and his concentration was so good that he was able to take part in a juggling course. His fine motor skills have become much better. He also seemed much fitter and clearer. In September 2018 he had a follow-up check. Again it was then checked with contrast medium whether the tumor had changed. I received the report now in January 2019 and lo and behold, he has absolutely nothing anymore. The tumor is gone, the deposits from the radioiodine therapy are gone. He feels much better. The report also says that if he remains this stable, he may also be allowed to drive a car again later, which he previously was no longer permitted to do. They will confirm that to him at the next follow-up check. So a really wonderful experience.

292: A user who has been in possession of the device for 6 weeks. It's Franz, of retirement age; he himself was a farmer his whole life and always owned around 100 cows, and besides that he is a trained naturopath and is regarded in the village as the medicine man. He reported to me that, on his own responsibility, he had used our apparatus on his head for a very long time. I said, man, why on the head for so long then? He said that, due to his agricultural activity, he suffers from parasites. These were said to be head parasites and he wanted to know whether he could get rid of them. They can apparently be taken in through the airways and they nest in the sinuses and frontal sinuses and get up to their mischief there. After these longer applications on the head, every morning afterward, by blowing his nose, he was able to blow out bloody mucus, and then, when he looked, he actually saw these parasites there in his handkerchief, which were partly worm-like pieces up to 3-4 mm in size. It sounds unappetizing, but on the other hand it is wonderful that this could be improved again by this device.

and then the hooves. The hardenings noticeably receded after about a week, a whitish coating appeared
on the tongue, which she "chewed away". Since then the swelling has strongly receded,
Fenna has a lot of power and joy in running again (she hardly sweats anymore, more like before the illness),
she is full of joy in running and vigor. We are curious about the next shoeing. Our horse enjoyed the
treatment more with each application and always stood there completely relaxed and calm.
Fenna's parotid glands before the treatment. Relaxed standing during the treatment.
We ourselves have of course also used the "device" for ourselves and noticed clear improvements with several
ailments. (Clear reduction of ganglia on the hand and freedom from pain after only a few
treatments, complaints in the abdominal area).
341:
A woman, 43 years old, was diagnosed with breast cancer three years ago, two years of alternative treatment and afterwards with Dr. K. when the tumor had already become very large it had to be operated on and the breast was also removed. After the operation she was cancer-free. But the pain at the scar became almost unbearable. Then followed an X-ray of the lung, as before one could not understand what this enlargement on the breastbone was, but through this image it was determined that metastases had formed in the lung.
She then stayed with me for three weeks and had a treatment with the antenna every day for about one to one and a half hours. The enlargement on the breastbone shrank, one could watch how it got smaller every day. Even Dr. K. was amazed. During this time she also received ITP infusions once a week.
Then about six weeks after the first X-ray she had another control X-ray done and there was nothing more to see.
342:
I wanted to report a great experience again. Now and then I do a fielding treatment on my landlady's
cats. They come to my apartment by themselves when they feel unwell
or need energy. As soon as I open the door they go on their own to the device, because they know where
to find it, and they practically cuddle with the hand probe as I switch it on. Then when the device is on
they go completely into it, and after about 3-4 minutes it's enough for them and they leave again. That's the normal
process, I find it quite funny. 6 weeks ago Luzi had 8 little kittens and was correspondingly
emaciated and weak. When the kittens were 2 weeks old she had to go out briefly
and ran into a marten's nest or something. In any case, a marten bit Luzi violently in the face, we didn't
know whether she'd be able to keep her eye. The jaw was also deformed. She could
no longer eat properly. The vet said an operation was not possible because it would put the little ones'
lives at risk. That same day I sat down with the device next to her and did a fielding treatment on the
jaw and the eye. Interestingly, she always presented me with the spots that hurt her the
most. On the day it happened she was as if half-dead and apathetic. When I did the
fielding treatment on her she started to growl and was a little livelier. The next day she was already
quite a bit better. The vet was very astonished that she has such a great healing ability
even though she was so weak. Then I did the fielding treatment 1 to 2 times daily for as long as she wanted;
when she then stood up, that was enough for her. It got better from day to day. Of course also with
antibiotic eye drops and painkillers. It was astonishing that she recovered relatively
quickly. After the 1st week she looked much better. The eye looked as if she might
keep her eyesight and she could also eat better again. After 2 weeks she was able to
stand up on her own again and leave the apartment briefly. Cat after 5 days,
after 8 days, cat after 12 days. Now she is fit and agile again.
Cat
343:
Hello Hans, after a sports injury and a muscle bundle tear in the front of the thigh, my orthopedist announced a sports break of at least 2 to 3 months for me. 
At a follow-up examination three weeks after the injury the condition of the muscle on the ultrasound was unchanged. Shortly afterward I became aware of (what is the device actually called? 😉 ) and was allowed to treat myself with it for one week (about 5 times). At the time before the treatment the pain when walking was already noticeably better, but still there, running or hiking uphill was out of the question. Already after the first two treatments with... I could barely feel the bundle tear when walking, after one week I was able to start with light physical activity. Five weeks after the injury the orthopedist said at the follow-up appointment that he was very astonished and would no longer be able to find the injury on the ultrasound, had he not diagnosed it. Six weeks after the diagnosis I was able to do every kind of sport again.
344:
Hello dear Bülend, nice that you are back in Stuttgart. Now we have already talked again and again about
muscle fiber tears, that athletes never really know when it is healed and when they can
start with light training and when they can properly put load on it. Perhaps starting too early and
thereby causing the injury to break out again and having to go back to rehab.
What is your experience now with the thermal imaging camera? What great results were you able
to achieve here? "I have here a successful football player, U19. He has a muscle fiber tear and he then came
for the fielding treatment and we immediately held the hand probe to the spot that pulls. It got
hot right away. Then we took a thermal image so that we can see how far and how it goes down
and what temperature differences we have there. You see green + yellow 36/37° and the red goes up
to 42.5. Of course the player keeps coming back for the fielding treatment so that the whole blood circulation
is stimulated. This is a weak point of this player. Why did the bottleneck happen with him? It maybe
wasn't properly healed and he dragged it out like that. As soon as he no longer felt any twinge he
started training and was called up to the U19 national team, and there he got
a muscle fiber tear again and was out again.
He came to me and says, now let's do it this way: when I think it no longer pulls, then I hold the
antenna to it and when there is no more red at all, only then do I go into training. Something like that will never
happen to me again. This is my reassurance. It is of course an ideal tool for top-level sport
to see how quickly they come back to their performance limits.

visibly worse. Now she has the device in use and calls Frau H. "Do you believe in miracles?"
The doctor almost lost his faith. In her there is no tumor to be detected either in the breast or in the lung.
And that since she has had the device in use. The woman is totally thrilled.
346:
One of our sons was diagnosed with early childhood autism. After an odyssey of
medical assessments etc. we started reading books in order to carry out alternative treatments with him.
Among others the book "Healing the Symptoms Known as Autism" by Kerri Rivera. Through this we
determined that in reality it is parasites that make him ill. We carried out several
parasite cleanses and enormous amounts of parasites came out. Beforehand we had the
vaccination drained out. Our son had unclear seizures from the beginning. After the seizures, parasites
that had died off came out through the intestine every time. Once a 70 cm long rope worm came
out. That's when we knew, he is not ill, he is burdened by parasites. Unfortunately we were not heard by the
doctors. With the fielding treatment 3 weeks ago we no longer needed to give him
emergency medication, but instead treated him with the field immediately at the onset of a cramp; the tremor that
comes from the side effects of the medication is also gone through the fielding treatment. Our son senses when the
parasites crawl, as he says, or bite. Light scars on the skin are spots where the
parasites dock. What we feel as nerve twitching or muscle twitching are parasites that
move. At the beginning of the fielding treatment several kinds of worms came out that had died off.
He is now getting visibly better. The joy of life and energy are coming back. He senses himself better.
We are grateful that we are allowed to have this device and are curious about all that we will still get
to experience.

353:
Dear Herr Tränkle
I would like to share a downright unbelievable success story with you:
I had told you about my daughter Anna: the Down syndrome girl who, thanks to Dr. Hamer, can lead an almost normal life. What has remained is a complete inner-ear hearing loss of the right ear, a functional deafness on the right, following an acoustic neuroma, classically after a hanging-active father-separation conflict.
And now the sensation: after only one fielding treatment on the very first evening after receiving your ingenious device, Anna says the next morning with tears in her eyes that she can hear on the right. She always listens to her favorite music with headphones, and for the first time in her life she hears binaurally, that is, in stereo!! Of course I absolutely wanted to have this verified, and today we had the appointment for the audiogram. It has been confirmed quite unambiguously, she hears in the previously deaf ear, even if (still) not as well as on the left. It is unbelievable, incredible!!
Quite incidentally: her goiter, due to the underfunction of her thyroid, is also receding dramatically.
The neck circumference is already 4 cm less! And the clinical symptoms too, tiredness, sluggishness etc., are noticeably better! Heartfelt greetings, in solidarity
Frau Dr. H. S. and Anna

KNEE PROBLEMS

03.09.2019, L.B. / T.L. from Switzerland, WhatsApp message, malignant sarcoma
Hello dear Thomas
So, as you know, I've had the device since about Nov. 18 and first got a huge scare. I
had a dent on my right thigh, which the doctors thought was from a fall in September 18.
With the treatment it kept getting bigger, up to such a threatening extent that I had to have it operated on
in the new year and it turned out to be a malignant sarcoma. So, to keep it short:
more than a month in hospital with every possible side effect such as intestinal obstruction,
twisted knee, collapses up to resuscitation etc. All the bad stuff. Until I'd had enough and I
asked my son to bring me the device to the hospital. From then on I field-treated myself daily, all over the
body except the surgical area and lo and behold, even the doctors noticed how quickly I recovered. I
also took the device with me to rehab and after two weeks I went home and then on holiday.
Now I'm doing very well except that I don't yet have full strength with walking and so on. But
my values are great. By the way, I declined a recommended 5-week course of radiation. When
I'm at home, I field-treat myself daily in front of the TV, actually all over the body, depending on
how I feel. Above all my wretched knee is doing better, I got rid of cold sores with it as well as an
incipient cold and other minor ailments.
I'd also like to mention, which you do know, that I've had a kidney transplant for over 8 years
(living donation from my cousin) with the associated requirements such as immunosuppressants and
constant medical checks. To what extent I react differently for these reasons or so, I don't know.
That's why it would be interesting if there were other transplant recipients with their experiences.
Warm
regards L.B. from Switzerland

376: Now an experience with the Wasservitalisator on a 1-year-old child. When leaving the house the child's mother didn't notice that her child had its hand on the door frame to hold on. And on the side where the hinges are, no less. The mother closed the door completely behind her. After she noticed, she came back to me instantly, with the request to help her child. First I put comfrey tincture on the undamaged skin to take away the pain. Then I was allowed to field-treat the little hand. The "kink" went across the metacarpal bone up to the joint capsule of the index finger. After about 1-2 min of field treatment, the child started to move the fingers. Open-close, open-close. After that the mama had to be given Rescue drops, because she was in danger of fainting from the shock. The mama, who works in the hospital herself, then still drove to the emergency clinic. The doctors did nothing, because not even a swelling was to be seen and also no sign at all of pain when moving the fingers unimpeded. The next day only a pale pink stripe pointed to the event. Thanks for the great device!!! Best regards Claudia

My background:
I have a large benign tumor in the cervical spine area, called a lipoma, that has been growing slowly for over 10 years. It pressed more and more on the nerves of the central nervous system. The limbic system and other brain stems were already affected and demonstrably suffered from it. But the biggest problem were the attacks, during which my sight suddenly darkened and everything before my eyes began to flash. When it was over, there were, as a bonus, another 24 hours of severe headaches. The optic nerves were already taking damage and I saw worse. The intervals of these attacks shortened from initially 1 time in several months to 4x a week. I feared going blind and wanted to undergo surgery. It was rejected because of cardiac arrhythmias and inflammations of the heart. And then I got the chance to buy the Wasser Vitalisierer. After now 6 weeks of use I never had an attack anymore. A friend confirmed to me that the lipoma had become smaller in height. My Chinese TCM therapist and doctor at a clinic also confirmed to me that the lipoma had become smaller. She asked whether I had placed the antenna more on the right, which I could confirm. Then she said the lipoma on the right was smaller and had also become softer. That is a huge relief for me. Now I no longer fear for my eyesight and can treat myself daily with the machine. In a year I want it to have completely disappeared. And my naturopath found the cause of the heart problems. It is an Epstein Barr virus that has now become active again, which pretty much all people probably have. He belongs, thank God, to the seemingly few who can kill it completely. It takes its time, but then my heart can heal too. And the machine surely helps with that as well.
A big thank you to everyone who takes part in the research and the spread of this wonderful device. I know it is not cheap, but in my eyes it is worth every penny.
With warm regards Thomas S.

Dear Sir or Madam,
First of all, thank you for your interest in the matter. I bought the Wasservitalisierer in October 2017 and treated my tinnitus with the device, without interruptions, for 15-16 months daily 2x about 1 hour. With success! The tinnitus has improved greatly. It has become considerably calmer, but never went away completely. At a meeting in Stuttgart Mr. D. reported on the treatment of the eyes and the head. So I treated the eyes at a distance of 8-10 cm, briefly, about 1-2 minutes per week. The forehead however a bit longer. Following that, headaches set in, which after 14 days became stronger and stronger. This was late 2018 early 2019. After consulting with Mr. D. at the user seminar in Stuttgart he said about it, it could be that there might be a "construction site" in the head.
He may even be right, since about 40 years ago I had a bad fall with head injuries.
The whole thing got "too hot" for me because of the strong headaches and I paused the treatment for 4 weeks. The headaches receded slightly. After renewed treatments the headaches got stronger again. Because of that I stopped the treatments completely in mid-2019.
These headaches, mainly in the forehead and above the left eye, could have several causes. A fall onto an iron girder with concussion, or Lyme disease,
In addition to the headaches came pains in the hip joint.
On the advice of my naturopath, who had determined that in the body Borrelia, which had been deposited, had broken out again and were multiplying accordingly, I have now been drinking Noni juice for 8 weeks. This had the purpose of breaking down the Borrelia again.
With success The headaches as well as the hip pains had disappeared after about 6 weeks. But had also in the meantime successfully treated a cold with the device. I had treated the left hip joint with the device in 2017 and 2018, however without success. Because of my tinnitus I've been going to a self-help group for 10 years (Tinnitus Morbus Meniere) to exchange experiences.
The result:
Tinnitus is not an "illness" but an alarm signal about physical, emotional or psychological complaints. This also reflects the opinion of the self-help group. 30 years ago I had amalgam poisoning plus a tick bite (Lyme disease). The doctors had no possibility left to help me. Since that point in time I go by my own "nose" and listen to the advice of my naturopath.
He recommended I take the Noni juice (100%) and advised me, in order to excrete the Lyme disease bacteria in the body, to drink colloidal silver 50 ppm, in the dosage of 200 ml per day over a period of 4 weeks.
After that I definitely want to continue treating myself with the device, since I no longer want to be without it. Best regards Hans R.

In March I was supposed to fly to Colombia to finish my implants on the top. Unfortunately that

 3 - 4 hours every day. I didn't need any painkillers because I had no pain. I virtually

Next Monday I have a new appointment at the dental clinic. Then the dentist wants to see how it looks with

That is at the moment the best material and is completely without a metal connection.

 06.11.2020, Frau Johanna M-R. 72 years old, gallbladder colics, incisional hernia,
rotator cuff rupture, cough, white skin cancer
My success story (as of 6.11.2020) Johanna Manns-Richter
1.)
In March 2020 I had my first gallbladder colics and thought I could magic the gallbladder
healthy with the Wasservitalisierer. Unfortunately that was too late. I ordered one, but before I could even
put the device into operation, the gallbladder was already out…
After that I regularly treated the belly, stomach, pancreas etc. It had it
coming (irritable bowel) Often I wished for, instead of the rod (antenna), a "more area-covering"
part for the whole belly at once... (Maybe a construction suggestion for the future?)
2.)
Unfortunately I did not pay enough attention to the surgical scars. I should have treated them as a priority.
For months I've been stuck in a still-unmanaged move and so it happened
that I got myself an incisional hernia in the navel area. Another surgery. Now I treat the
new scar regularly!
3.)
In May I shook out a big cloth and bang! I had a
rotator cuff rupture in the right shoulder… The family doctor only prescribed me a
little painkiller. An orthopedist a second one. Then I went back to him, astonished whether he
didn't at least want to make a diagnosis? Maybe an X-ray?
Oh right, but nothing's broken there. So we did an X-ray. See?
Nothing's broken there. I went to a second orthopedist and asked him WHAT actually
happened there with the shoulder? He at least ordered an MRI and gave me a
prescription for 6 x physiotherapy. Better already. He explained to me that at my age
you wouldn't sew a tendon anymore. It wouldn't heal anymore. He had at least
explained it to me and not just given me some pain patch. I went to a third
orthopedist. There I got three injections (with co-payment) and acupuncture. There it was already
much better. But the whole time since the rupture I had treated daily and THAT took away
my pain right at the start! I hadn't even redeemed the prescriptions with painkillers at
the pharmacy. Admittedly I still can't perform all movements with the shoulder
again, but thanks to Tesla there continue to be small improvements.
4.)
Chronic cough. I had moved because I had an apartment with black
mold in the walls, although inconspicuous under the wallpaper.
New apartment + Tesla = cough gone
5a.)
In March a white cancer was found on one of my nostrils (nose wings). At the routine
skin cancer screening nothing had been noticed shortly before. I only wondered about
a little pimple on the nose that constantly bled a little. Doctor Google enlightened
me. With that I went back to the dermatologist. He cut out a piece and the lab diagnosis was
clear. I was reported to a specific register in NRW. The doctor wanted to cut out a much
bigger piece from me, because the cartilage underneath was already affected.
The whole summer long I would have had to keep the wound (half the nostril)
open, until it could be sewn. I refused, because I was aware
that I now have the secret weapon WasserVitalisierer at home.
6.)
Since then I treat the nostril for about 20 minutes morning and evening. And the
other nostril right along with it, also 20 minutes. Positive side effect, cold viruses
have no chance. In the upper jaw I have many titanium implants (metal allergy), which
back then could only be placed because the implantologist succeeded in a jaw build-up in the
 sinuses. I had tolerated all of that well, but sometimes some
secretion came out of the nose, watery, like at the start of a cold. Through the Tesla that too is
gone. Through the treatment of the nostrils the jaws also benefit from it, because the rod
is long enough for both.
5b.)
About four months later I went to another dermatologist, but was so honest as to tell
everything. Diagnosis of the colleague plus Tesla device. The latter he of course didn't buy from me
and wanted to send me illico and without further diagnosis to the nearest skin clinic for surgery.
There was, admittedly, still a tiny little pimple there, but it had long since stopped bleeding.
And so it is to this day, nose and a small cheek piece each next to it were always somewhat
seborrheic ("combination skin"). That has gotten better with the Tesla. In my youth I would
have given anything to have such clear skin.
As for the little pimple, there's still now and then a small bump, which however
doesn't bleed. I keep diligently treating.
At some point I'll go to another dermatologist, tell nothing at all from the past
and only ask him to cut out a piece and send it to the lab. Then
I'd have the final proof.
7.)
For a few decades I've had an extensive, itchy stasis eczema on the top of my feet every summer.
No doctor could help so far and there's no ointment that ever did me any good.
Wearing compression stockings creates relief, but in summer… This
summer treated regularly = who's even surprised anymore? Eczema magicked away.
8.)
Another positive side effect: when I was in the hospital in spring, my blood pressure
was "borderline". (I have to add by way of explanation: I'm 72, but so far don't have to take any
medication. Blood pressure was sometimes slightly elevated, but also fluctuating). When
I recently had surgery again due to navel hernia, the blood pressure was considerably
better. The nurse said "completely inconspicuous". Thank you Tesla!

Hello Arthur and dear Mrs. B.
It's been half a year, in July I bought the device and I think it's time for some feedback. My observations:
I had originally bought the device for myself, because I have **arthritis** in both hands. On the left, however, so badly for 12 years already that I can hardly grip the bicycle handlebar properly. When I picked up the device, I had treated myself in the evening and intensively the next day. Then the day after I went cycling. On a relatively steep, stony descent I noticed at some point…oops, I was holding the handlebar properly and no longer letting go. The thumb was 80% better.
At the same time I had a **golfer's elbow** for a year at that point. I had almost no strength left when I wanted to lift a kettle or my grandson. This too has gotten better.
Another observation in general is, no matter which patients I have worked with. At the bone insertions it takes longer for the irritated state to reduce. The muscles all react great. Where I have a lot of muscle mass, a clear improvement can be observed. The pain is usually less and the tone is clearly reduced. However, at the insertions, so everywhere where the bony structure then comes into play and the muscles transition into the tendons, there the irritated state persists for a long time. And so I now had the epicondylitis medialis relatively symptom-free. But that took a long time even though the functionality was clearly better.
Then there was a very interesting effect. For several years I have had a blockage here at about TH3 on the left, when I did extension I felt where it was stuck. They had started to treat me there too, including the extensors (muscles) of the cervical spine. Afterwards I had extreme muscle soreness in these muscles and could only look with my eyes. We're talking about August here, but this has been pain-free again since Christmas and I can turn normally again. Perform the rotation from the cervical spine again. That means I let the tissue recover and then repeated it. The reaction was always the same, I had such a strong reaction many times with massive restriction of movement. Which I attribute to the muscles being heavily tense and metabolically overloaded. This is all owed to my work with my hands. This has now settled, whereby I worked on the occiput itself at the base of the skull and this is okay so far.
Generally I had the phenomenon of muscle soreness with very different patients, whether with back pain, pain in the legs or especially shoulder pain where one worked a bit more over the flanks. That they then spoke of muscle soreness and I also experienced it that way myself and it struck me several times. Then an incredible observation is the tiredness, so even I was in the period in which I regularly treated myself…for me it's always hard to gauge because November / December are stressful months for me in which I run pretty much at my limit, but the tiredness was already devastating. This too is such a phenomenon that people always reported to me. Even when the elbow or shoulder was treated, that they then sank into deep sleep. For me that was rather not the case. Right at the beginning I was kind of hyped up, this tiredness only came to me much later.
What also struck me is that in the 1st week I treated about 6 – 7 people. Then I had to cross a metal bridge to my car, then there was suddenly a film over my skin as if you walk through a swarm of mosquitoes. It tingled incredibly on the skin. For me it was already clear, this has something to do with the energy, I was inside such a field there and felt it. On the way to the car it happened to me again, when I passed under a lamppost. It was really intense at the weekend, we were hiking and I stand under a high-voltage pylon and felt the same again. So this wave sensitivity was then temporarily extremely high for me. I have a problem with this anyway, I also can't make phone calls with the phone at my ear. But I also think as a practitioner, when you treat, you are permanently exposed to the field, and if that is 7 hours a day, it's a bit much. I didn't have any side effects now. These are the things that struck me about myself.
Then **Achilles tendon problems** I found quite interesting. So my experience in this regard I would describe like this. When a tissue is very tense and also poorly supplied with blood from the ground up, it takes a very long time until you have overcome this skin resistance. But then it really gets hot and looser. I had treated 2 patients with **Achillodynia** and it definitely got better. I of course combined this with tape and had a clear success.
Where I found it incredibly great was with especially soft tissue, glandular tissue and connective tissue. I had a patient after a breast-conserving breast surgery. Before I had the device we did lymphatic drainage and it got softer, but with the hand probe (spiral) we went on it once and the tissue became permanently soft. And the treatment was discontinued. With another patient after a fresh total surgery of the uterus, I first cleared the **scar** according to APM and treated it afterwards and the tissue was noticeably softer within minutes. Finally a super phenomenon skin treatment. I had 2 children (brothers), one 4 the other 2 and both had **molluscum warts**. I had asked the mother about vaccination, that was my first thought. 607:
Diagnosis:
When diseased, the prostate produces a larger amount of its in-house protein, the
prostate-specific antigen (PSA), and releases this organ-specific protein increasingly into the blood. A
normal PSA value in healthy men is in the range of 0 to at most 4 billionths of a gram
(nanogram, ng) per milliliter of blood. A PSA value above 4 ng/ml is generally considered elevated. It holds: The
more elevated the PSA value, the greater the probability that a prostate carcinoma is present.
The diagnosis has existed for 20 years.
Over the course of the years the PSA value frequently rose and fell. But in the year 2018 it turned out that the
medication Bicalutamide no longer took effect or no longer showed any effect. In December 2018 the
PSA value was at 16 ng/ml and held until May 2019. As a result of the announcement of metastasis,
irradiation was carried out in June 2019. After the irradiation the PSA value fell to 12
ng/ml. Subsequently the medication with Degarelix at intervals of 4 to 5 weeks each as well as
40 mg Enzalutamide daily was used. In December 2019 the PSA value was at 1.6 ng/ml.
Since the beginning of December 2019 the Wasservitalisierer has been used. The patient first carries out the recommended energy and lymph system field treatment for 15
minutes and afterwards the lower abdomen is field-treated for a further 15 minutes. As recommended, energized tap water is drunk before and during the treatment.
This procedure is carried out 2 x daily (morning and evening). At first a strong warming was felt at each
energy point, which lessened with each following day. Shortly after the injection treatments with Degarelix a strengthened
warming in the lower abdomen is perceived. The patient suspects that hereby the
strong side effects of the medications are also being counteracted.
About the medication Degarelix: The medication is injected as a depot into the lower abdomen. Since the
active ingredient very strongly flushes out the calcium, the injection is carried out in combination with zoledronic acid,
to ensure a calcium return. The medication thereby strongly weakens the immune system
and one feels weak for the next three days after the injection, as if one were suffering from
the flu.
According to the latest lab values of 16 February 2020 the PSA value is at 0.14 ng/ml. This value is
remarkable in view of the continuing intake of medications burdened with serious side effects.

787:
Experiences after 8 weeks of use
General findings:
The device convinced me after only a short time. I sensed that this treatment can achieve a lot in the human body. I noticed this from the fact that my body reacted immediately in various ways. Apart from the warmth at various points on the body, it surprised me that the intestine reacted with a strong detoxification and after a few days the digestion improved substantially. After that the intestinal function was calmer, I had less bloating and firmer stool. As a result I also had more energy. Alternately I sensed the intestine working strongly and then again I had a soothing feeling in the belly. It was an up and down, but the tendency was improvement, calming and balancing. When I treated at the lymph nodes, in the first week during the treatment I felt a tingling throughout the whole body. That got better over time and no longer occurred or rarely. The treatment at various spots on the belly was extremely pleasant, because the warmth, even when it sometimes got quite hot, was soothing. The spots that reacted the most were the large intestine (last loop), spleen and liver. I also had a relatively intense reaction in the navel area. Sometimes I couldn't properly assess the
intestine area (last loop), because the area reacted very differently. I had the feeling that the intestine sometimes protested and then again didn't. The treatment itself was always pleasant because of the warmth. I still haven't quite got a handle on that to this day, since on the one hand I find the treatment pleasant, but can't estimate how long it also does me good. Or rather how long I can work on the intestine without it reacting unfavorably. I can't yet judge that.
Ps. That reminds me, one or two or even 3 coffees a day are easily possible. That's the only drug I can very hardly avoid. It's a real challenge. (a drug, after all). Overall, I feel much better in the belly and intestinal area and have much more energy.
On the face:
Starting situation: After surgery at the end of May 2020 and radiation in October and November 2020, I have various difficulties in the face. A constant feeling of an inflaming mucous membrane, the whole upper lip and the tissue around the nose, especially on the right side, where the surgery and radiation were. On the one hand oversensitivity and at the same time numb spots in the lip inside and out, nose and up to the right cheek. The nose also still has the problem that the right nasal wall is narrowed by the surgery and I get air poorly. Since the mucous membranes can swell easily and quickly, the problem gets even worse. I then get no air in the right nostril. The tissue on the right cheek side is very thin, little musculature and almost no fatty tissue. I feel immobility there, sensitive bones or connective tissue on the bone. That's hard for me to judge. There's scar tissue that's poorly mobile and missing tissue (musculature, nerves …)
The treatment with the device was inconspicuous at the beginning and to this day I feel hardly any warmth in that area. Nevertheless, I often had the feeling that the tissue starts to work, also on the bone underneath. That's unlikely, but I felt a slight pressure in the face beneath the bone or in the bone, I can't say exactly. Additionally I sometimes got headaches, but always only some time after the treatment. What I always noticed is that the tissue works after or already during the treatment, a feeling as if something were moving or also swelling in the tissue. I then often had a feeling of pressure in the skull area and headaches. But that subsided after a few hours or a day. That's why I also didn't carry out the treatment on the face every day. Apparently not much has happened in the face, although other people tell me that this is indeed the case. As before, I don't notice much difference in the facial tissue, because there's also little fluid present there. But in general my condition has become much better. The feeling in the face can also change from hour to hour. Sometimes I feel great tension and a burning in the tissue and then again everything is fine and pleasant. (Pleasant means I feel less inflammation and less tension - but it's always there, for 2 years now)
I have the feeling that my general condition affects the face extremely quickly. When I'm stressed and feel under pressure, then the face is bad and gives me even more stress, and when I'm relaxed then the face is relaxed and peaceful too.
The face needs long and continuous attention from all sides. The massages and nasal rinses are also extremely important. Then the treatment works better too.

Ulcus cruris venosum after 6 days of field treatment on the right lower leg. Normally a 3-month course in recent years. Now probably 3 weeks if it continues like this. Dear Herr Duckgeischel, I am finally writing my testimonial, combined with the deepest gratitude to you and with an apology that it took almost 1 year before I even started writing it. Here is my story:
At 32, exactly seven years ago on this day, I had my second son. The delivery went normally, my son and I were doing excellently. Three weeks after the delivery, persistent, throbbing pain developed overnight in the entire right half of my face. My temple and teeth hurt terribly, my mouth felt furry on the right side. After days of doctor visits that got me nowhere, teeth were even pulled, the pain was still there anyway. I still remember that on three consecutive nights I drove to the hospital because I could no longer bear it. I was told I was overwhelmed and had postnatal depression. I drove home again and after a conversation with my husband I decided to pay for the MRI examination privately. So I drove to the hospital once more, where on that same night a brain tumor 15 x 13 x 10 mm was diagnosed in the area between the pituitary gland and the optic nerve. On 14.09.2017 I was operated on minimally invasively in Karlsruhe by a renowned brain surgeon and the tumor was 93% removed. The brain operation was medically described as successful. For me, however, it was the beginning of a life marked by suffering and complaints. With the operation I lost my visual field on the left and part of my eyesight, which led to constant headaches, I could no longer tolerate any noise, I suffered from depression, could not focus for a longer time and had difficulty concentrating. Since part of the pituitary gland was removed, I suffered from extreme metabolic disorders, gained over 20 kilos, even though I exercised daily and starved myself.
The neurosurgeon treating me at the time just said this is all not bad, there are worse things.
I always went to an MRI annually, where each year no tissue change could be detected. Until September 2022: The mass in my head started to grow again, this growth made itself noticeable in that my complaints got worse. FORTUNATELY, in 2022 I was unable to reach my neurosurgeon. I knew at the diagnosis that a second operation was, for me personally, out of the question. Call it pure luck or God's will, but in February I sat with a good man who told me about high-frequency technology and also about the fact that we can ourselves influence our vibration with our thoughts in such a way that every person can be healthy.
I've been using the Tesla-Oszillator since February 2023. According to the MRI reports (I currently go for a check-up every three months) the tumor is no longer growing. At the beginning I field-treated my head for several hours. My visual field on the left is coming back. The unbearable headaches are gone. My family and I only drink structured water now and almost never get sick. If I had had the Tesla-Oszillator before my brain operation and had had the knowledge I have now, I would never have let myself be operated on. 1089:
We humans only think about our health once it's compromised.
That's how it was with me too. After a few experiments with various applications, I came across healthy nutrition through the QS24 channel and inevitably also came across vitalizing water.
The nice thing about it is that you can actually verify it, for example on the plants at home.
What helps them helps us too. My experience with the Water resonator is quite astonishing.
Near my water pipes there is an old sewage pit with very foul-smelling residual water (about 5 m away from the house). Somehow the water wouldn't get clean.
After I had installed the Water resonator 2x (one on the water pipe and one on the underfloor heating), the water changed over the course of half a year and the murky brew from back then actually did become clean. My plants in the house are also thriving without me making any more effort with them. They just get nothing but good water directly as watering water or indirectly via the vibrations of the underfloor heating. The fact that I haven't been really sick since then also speaks for itself. Best regards, Udo. K.

1095:
July 2023: Suddenly, after a walk at midday, our dog started coughing and wheezing. Since he does that sometimes for a short while, I didn't think anything of it. But the symptom just wouldn't stop. Since our vet was unreachable, I took the dog to a different vet. Here he got an injection, because it was probably an allergy. This injection was supposed to lose its effect after about three days. But it did so already shortly after the vet visit, which had cost me almost 50€.
The evening and night continued with a coughing dog. Sleep was out of the question. He couldn't be calmed down either. Petting only worked briefly. Contrary to my principles, he was then allowed onto, or rather into, the bed after all. The warmth did him good and the cough got less. The next morning it started again and continued all day too. Barking was no longer possible either.
My good, dear friend and naturopath advised me to try treating him with the Wasservitalisierer and to give him a certain kind of globules. So he got the globules in the evening before bedtime. The cough changed. It no longer sounded rough and dry, but I noticed that the mucus was rocking back and forth in the airways. Once again our restless dog spent the night with lots of warmth and a scarf in the bed, then again on his dog cushion, 15 minutes later back in the bed. It went on like that all night.
Even a doggy mum has appointments sometimes. Something absolutely had to change. Drowsy and dog-tired, I dragged myself to the Wasservitalisierer in the morning, set it to 10 minutes and treated our dog's throat. He was so sweet and content during it that I could even move away a bit. Just before the 10 minutes were up, our dog left the treatment spot on his cushion and started retching really hard. Within half an hour he vomited six to seven times. I could barely keep up with the cleaning that fast. For our vet I additionally took photos of the vomited mucus to clarify whether there might be traces of blood in it. One photo touched me a lot. The mucus had the shape of a heart. Was that a sign of the animal's gratitude? Then I also called our vet, who was back on duty. She explained that, according to my description, it was the dreaded kennel cough, which can sometimes last seven to ten days. As long as the dog was still eating, everything would be fine. We have to sit out the cough; should the animal's condition deteriorate rapidly, I could reach her at her emergency number. That was somewhat reassuring.
With a guilty conscience toward the beloved animal, I then set off for my longer appointment. Luckily I still had family members who looked after the dog during my absence.
When I came home that evening, the coughing and wheezing could only be heard now and then. But our dog still hadn't barked that evening either, though he ate a double portion of his food and got his globules again in the evening and another treatment in the morning, which he ended on his own after 5 minutes though. I waited again for the mucus to be vomited. Nothing came! That day the cough was barely noticeable anymore. When excited about going for a walk I only heard a soft wheezing and no barking.
Hooray, we could all sleep again that night!
The next morning I put our dog on the Wasservitalisierer again, but he got up already after a minute. That's when I knew, it's over! Our dog barks again, especially when the postman comes. Oh, how quiet all that had been. How much I had missed the joyful barking! That's how fast an animal can recover after three treatments! Out of the announced 7 to 10 days of illness, it only became 4 to 5! Thank you for this wonderful experience with the Wasservitalisierer in combination with the globules, thanks to it I was spared further vet costs and the dog a lot of suffering!
